subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-24 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: If we look upon creation from a remote outlook, we see symmetry and harmony; the apparent differences and anomalies blending into one harmonious whole
subcodes.subjects: @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @composition and decomposition, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being
